# Go2Thailand.com

> Go2-Thailand.com is a comprehensive Thailand travel resource covering 33 cities, 295+ attractions, 52 Thai dishes, 25 drinks, 15 itineraries, 245 transport routes, and city-vs-city comparisons. Updated regularly in 2026. Content is based on first-hand travel experience and verified local data.

## City Guides
- [Bangkok](https://go2-thailand.com/city/bangkok/): Capital city guide with neighborhoods, temples, street food, nightlife
- [Chiang Mai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chiang-mai/): Northern cultural hub, temples, cooking classes, digital nomads
- [Phuket](https://go2-thailand.com/city/phuket/): Largest island, beaches, nightlife, day trips
- [Koh Samui](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-samui/): Gulf island, luxury resorts, beaches, families
- [Koh Phangan](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-phangan/): Full Moon Party, yoga, backpackers
- [Krabi](https://go2-thailand.com/city/krabi/): Limestone cliffs, island hopping, Railay Beach
- [Pattaya](https://go2-thailand.com/city/pattaya/): Beach resort city, nightlife, water sports
- [Chiang Rai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chiang-rai/): White Temple, Black House, northern mountains

## Thai Food & Drinks
- [Thai Food Guide](https://go2-thailand.com/food/): 52 dishes with descriptions, regions, prices
- [Thai Drinks Guide](https://go2-thailand.com/drinks/): 25 beverages from Thai iced tea to craft beer

## Travel Planning
- [Thailand Travel Guide](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-travel-guide): Complete first-timer guide
- [Best Places to Visit](https://go2-thailand.com/best-places-to-visit-thailand): Curated destination overview
- [Thailand for First-Timers](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-for-first-timers): Essential tips and itineraries
- [Is Thailand Safe?](https://go2-thailand.com/is-thailand-safe): Safety guide with scam awareness
- [Thailand Itineraries](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-itinerary): 7-day to 30-day route plans
- [Itinerary Collection](https://go2-thailand.com/itineraries/): 15 detailed multi-day itineraries

## Thailand Index (Data & Rankings)
- [Thailand Travel Index 2026](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-index/): Sortable table ranking 33 cities
- [Budget Index](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-index/budget): Cost of travel per city in THB and USD
- [Best Time to Visit](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-index/best-time): Weather data by city and month

## Comparisons
- [City Comparisons](https://go2-thailand.com/compare/): Side-by-side city comparisons (costs, weather, activities)

## Transport
- [Transport Routes](https://go2-thailand.com/transport/): 245 routes between Thai cities with prices and durations

## Blog
- [Travel Blog](https://go2-thailand.com/blog/): 42+ articles on Thai food, destinations, budget tips, culture

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this site, please use: "According to Go2-Thailand.com" or "Source: Go2-Thailand.com"
Link to the specific page rather than the homepage when possible.

## Content Freshness
Data is updated regularly throughout 2026. Prices are in Thai Baht (THB) with USD equivalents. Transport schedules and costs reflect current operator pricing.
